general_feedback: The filled-in documentation is accurate, consistent with the surrounding Scaladoc style, and uses backticks correctly for code references. Descriptions for `@tparam C` on the class, `@return` on `cumulative`, and `@return` on `empty` all correctly capture the behavior. The repeated `@param canAccumulate` descriptions match the style already used elsewhere in the same object, which is the right call for consistency. Only minor stylistic tightenings are suggested; nothing requires changes.
